entries.note: Consistent with the NRS 640 statutory cap of $300

entries.expected: NVJAM (Nevada Jurisprudence Assessment Module) required for initial licensure: open-book online exam on NRS/NAC Chapter 640, pass mark 80% (16 correct)
entries.note: Also required BEFORE applying for a Nevada compact privilege; no separate NVJAM fee published on official pages

entries.expected: approximately 3-4 weeks with electronic fingerprint submission; approximately 6-8 weeks with hard-card fingerprints
15 continuing competency units (CCUs) within the year immediately preceding license renewal; from Jan 1, 2025 must include 1 CCU on Cultural, Access, and Ethical Standards; reported via CE Broker

omitted: nv-compact-privilege fee: NV issuing since 2026-01-20 (board compact page) but the remote-state fee amount is not indexable on official domains — confirm on ptcompact.org fee chart
NVJAM fee: no dollar amount published on official pages
